posts.week_theme: The Chaos of Car Hunting in Albania
posts.hook: Buying a new car in Albania in 2026 is financially irresponsible. Change my mind.

posts.caption: The numbers don't lie. A 2-year-old car in Albania holds 80% of its value and costs 40% less. Tell me I'm wrong 👇

slides.text: Here's why.
In Albania, Land Cruiser = success. Culturally embedded for 20+ years.
Mountain roads, potholes, mud. The LC handles it all. That's not marketing. That's reality.
Land Cruiser owners in Albania have a network. Parts, advice, service. Everyone knows someone.
Albanian market prices are 15–20% below Western Europe for equivalent condition LCs.
Every Land Cruiser listing across 4 markets. superalto.ai

posts.hook: Buying a car in spring vs. winter in Albania — what you need to know about timing
posts.content_description: How seasonality affects Albanian car prices and availability. When to buy, when to wait.
posts.caption: Timing is everything. Here's the data on Albanian car market seasonality. superalto.ai

slides.text: Albanian market seasonality — the data.
Most listings appear. Competition is highest. Prices are peak.
Market slows. Diaspora returns with imports. Unusual deals appear.
Best time to buy. Post-summer stock, motivated sellers, less competition.
Low inventory. Prices stable but few options. Ideal if you're selling.
SuperAlto tracks live listings daily. superalto.ai
